parents.subject: LU-10391 lnet: change lr_nid to struct lnet_nid

commit.subject: LU-10391 lnet: extend rspt_next_hop_nid in lnet_rsp_tracker
commit.message:
LU-10391 lnet: extend rspt_next_hop_nid in lnet_rsp_tracker

rspt_next_hop_nid in 'struct lnet_rsp_tracker' is now
a 'struct lnet_nid'.
